entry.title: Re: Check compatibility pack usage in SAP S/4HANA with SAP EarlyWatch Alert
entry.content:
Hello Suzanne

My company is an SAP VAR partner, and we need to produce and send EWA reports to the client from our solution manager. However, with the new chapters only available through me.sap.com, we're forced to retrieve the reports manually.

Is it possible to send the new EWA reports in PDF or HTML (or both) format from me.sap.com to an email ?

Thank you in advance for your feedback.

entry.title: Re: Error 404 when trying to access a full stack CAP appl...
entry.content:
@MioYasutakeThank you for your response. Eventually, after posting this, I came across the below tutorial from SAP

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/deploy-to-cf..html

Here the steps mentioned helped me change the manifest.json as well as the mta.yaml file.

However, I do have one query. When the application is deployed, I see only 2 applications in my dev space, i.e. the service and the db-deployer.
Usually, we also have an approuter right from where we are able to access even the html5 app and accessing the html 5 app through cockpit leads to auth issue? What do we have to do do make our config that way? Also, is that the standard config which is followed?


Thanks,

Regards,

Raihan

entry.content:

then I add the currency and when I click finished I get these errors below :

entry.title: Re: Using Integration Suite with the power of AI
entry.content:
एहो

@1nbuc Thank you very much for sharing. Really looking forward to implement a test scenario and dig deeper!

entry.title: Re: Requesting Help ,Loading FILE From AL11 based on TIMESTAMP
entry.content:
Please check below two function modules.

1. /SDF/GET_FILE_INFO - It will give you list of all files in AL11 directory along with DATE and TIME. SORT it as per your requirement and find the workaround. 

2. EPS2_GET_DIRECTORY_LISITING - It will give you timestamp along with filename. SORT it as per your requirement and find the workaround.

entry.title: SAP CodeJam Request for Hamburg - ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
entry.content:
Dear (former) SAP colleagues 😉,

We at ASCAVO would be delighted to host an SAP CodeJam this September in Hamburg, Germany.

Proposed Dates:
Preferably between September 25th and 30th, or alternatively during the first two weeks of September (September 4th to 12th).

Topic:
ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

We would be very grateful for the opportunity and would greatly look forward to welcoming the SAP CodeJam expert and fellow developers to Hamburg.

Cheers,
Max

entry.title: Re: Can we hide or disable Self-description (introductory...
entry.content:
A possible workaround is to use "Manage Languages" to replace the text of the labels in the pop-up screen.

The standard values are the ones below, and you can replace the texts referring your internal policies about that content in your organizations. 

PPX_Self_DescriptionSelf-Description
PPX_Self_Description_DescIntroduce yourself briefly:
PPX_Self_Description_PlaceholderWrite about your professional background, skills, and interests

entry.title: Our SAP environment (7.50) utilizes OpenText software via archive link to store attachments for vari
entry.content:
Our SAP environment (7.50) utilizes OpenText software via archive link to store attachments for various business requirements.  To date we have amassed a large volume of attachments resulting in an increase of storage area.  In an attempt to avoid continually adding disc space to the OpenText database has anyone employed or know of a mass deletion scheme using parameters such as date ranges to address their growing volume of attachments.  There doesn’t appear to be any transaction in SAP which allows for this. 

Does any one have an update to share?  Thanks and Regards.

entry.title: Re: Efficient Data Maintenance in SAP Analytics Cloud System Overview - Housekeeping
entry.content:
Hi Nikhil,

Even i had a similar question, how i convinced is once story or MA/DA created, we do execute for testing at least once hence they will appear with "Last Access date" in System overview. my assumption might be wrong and looking for if any alternative available.

entry.title: Re: Our SAP environment (7.50) utilizes OpenText software via archive link to store attachments for
entry.content: That can be managed with the retention period settings in the configuration.

entry.title: Re: Error FAA_POST214 when reversing Asset Document of Le...
entry.content: Hi, Following note 3224015, Last closed year is 2023 and opened year is 2025 so difference is 2 years and this is the reason error FAA_POST214 is appearing. System by no means allowing to post reversal unless and until one of the opened year is closed. In sequence i have to close 2024 which requires depreciation posting for all 12 periods of 2024. As I mentioned in question, no depreciation is posted yet. I am quite skeptic that posting depreciation will further complicate the original concern which is to reverse the Legacy transfer posting. Do you think there could be any safe workaround given the circumstances explained in question above?

entry.title: Re: How to create a OData Service in Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi iamnaveen,

The equivalent extensibility for such a custom table is probably the Custom Business Object, which you can expose as an OData service and create a UI with the CBO.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/b45696ca0d9143cba040797e9c71aa44.html?locale=en-US

 If you want to adapt an app to use it or use it in your own app, you probably need to look into Developer Extensibility. I don't know a way of adding the table to an existing UI without Developer Extensibility if that is what you are trying to do. 

If you could describe your use case, there might be a better approach.

There are several blogs in the community about CBOs.

I hope this helps

entry.title: Re: Paging in a RAP service with complex search and a Fio...
entry.content:
This issue was eventually resolved for us. If you are on a S/4 HANA version lower than 2020, an adaptation project has a setting where you can increase it. This was the only solution that really worked for us (2020 version). Not sure if this is also on later version, but we found out it was gone in 2023.

 

Because we are now on 2023 since last Summer, we have moved away from this solution, because it is also not best practice to create an adaptation project for a custom app. Below code for the CDS view can be used to make it work then:

 

: {
  headerInfo: { typeName: 'Application Name',
                typeNamePlural: 'Application Names',
                title: { type: #STANDARD,
                         label: 'Application Namer',
                         value: 'Application Name' }
               },
  presentationVariant: [{
     sortOrder: [{
        by: 'Article',
        direction:  #ASC
       }],
     maxItems: 100,
     visualizations : [{ type: #AS_LINEITEM }]
     }]
}

entry.title: Microsoft Project integratuion with BW/4HANA or SAC
entry.content:
Hello.

We want to know if It's possible to integrate Microsoft Project with our current BW/4HANA (2.0 SP07) or our SAC (client 2025.1.12 and server 2025.1.10).

Regards.

Marcelo Mazieiro.

entry.title: Re: How to Call RESTful APIs from SAP ABAP: A Step-by-Step Guide
entry.content: @S_Shukla No need for that, as far as I know. You perhaps do need to register the certificate if it is a secured URL.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation - changes?!
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition has gone through updates in Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation (FCV) configuration, especially in Manage Your Solution / CBC > SSCUI 105450 (Define Rules for Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation).

Let’s clarify the changes and how to work with them now.

 

What Changed in SSCUI 105450?

Previously, you could directly assign G/L accounts for realized and unrealized foreign currency differences. In newer releases of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public, the configuration interface has been updated, and some fields like "Realized Gain/Loss" have been removed or renamed.

You now see something like this:

Account Type

What it Means

Unrealized Gain/Loss

Still used for FC valuation postings (standard)

Reset Gain/Loss

New term introduced for resetting prior FC valuation entries

Valuation Offset

Technical offset account (e.g., balance sheet account)

 

What is the "Reset" account?

The Reset Gain/Loss Account is used for reversing or resetting previously posted unrealized foreign currency valuation documents. This is part of the reset step in FCV processing — typically when the next valuation cycle begins or at period-end closing.

  • In Advanced FCV, the reset run reverses the prior period’s valuation entries (created with unrealized accounts).
  • The reset postings now go to a separate "Reset" G/L account, not re-using the original unrealized accounts.
  • This separation is designed for audit transparency and clearer reporting.

 

Where are realized Gain/Loss accounts now?

In the Advanced FCV, realized FX differences (e.g., at invoice clearing) are no longer configured via SSCUI 105450.

Instead:

  • Realized Gain/Loss G/L accounts are configured under Financial Accounting > General Ledger > Business Transactions > Gain/Loss Realized Exchange Differences.
  • Or they are automatically derived via Account Determination for Financial Accounting.

In short: Realized gain/loss accounts are handled by standard postings (e.g., at clearing of open items), not by Advanced FCV.

 

Where to find the documentation?

Here are the best references:

1. SAP Help Portal – Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD

Search: “Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation”
(Look for app-specific documentation for Schedule FCV Jobs, Valuation Runs, etc

2. Configuration Help in CBC
In SSCUI 105450, click the “i” (info icon) or the documentation link in CBC to access SAP’s embedded documentation.

 

I hope this will help answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Utilities and Tax Payments in Brazil
entry.content:
Dear Carol,

the attributes are stored in the table IDFI_BR_TAX_ATTR. I am not aware of any possibility to update the table in mass.

Kind regards,

Ondrej

entry.title: BLOQUEAR UN PRODUCTO PARA FACTURAR
entry.content:
buenos días, soy nuevo en SAP

Me gustaria saber como puedo bloquear un código de producto tanto para la entrega como para facturar.

es decir tengo un código de producto llamado código libre activado solamente para compras y facturas, ya que solo se usa este código para cotizar algún producto nuevo que no está en sistema y de compras

lo que quiero es como logro que este codigo 030245 no se pueda hacer Ordenes de ventas ni Factura que cuando lo llamen no permita ya que este producto de igual forma me deja facturarlo y no deberia ser

PENSE QUE COMO NO ESTA ACTIVADO PARA INVENTARIO ESTE NO BEBERIA DEJARSE FACTURAR POR QUE NO TIENE STOCK

ABAJO COLOCO CAPTURA DEL PRODUCTO

GRACIAS

entry.title: Re: Purpose Codes in Payment Media in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Steffi,

yes, you need to do a custom copy of DE_CGI_XML_CT_V9 because in the standard tree we do not show Regulatory Reporting (RgltryRptg) tag. You need to remove the condition from that element.

Kind regards,

Ondrej

entry.title: Re: Redesigned candidate exp config
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-recruiting/setting-up-and-maintaining-sap-successfactors-recruiting/business-rules-for-candidate-application?locale=en-US&q=business+rules

entry.title: Re: What is the best way to check for collisions of atten...
entry.content:
Hello Shalene,

   I check collision of extra time type by time valuation, try follow the step below

     1. You have to create time max length of extra time type.

         example: you have 2 extra time type that clocking time are

           08:00-13:00 and 11:00-17:00 => create max length is 08:00-17:00 = 9 hrs.

    2. Create time valuation to compare hours of max length with input extra time type

      

this results on timesheet UI

Hope this can help you.

Thank you.

entry.title: Error running step by step to generate ABAP Flight Reference Scenario tables
entry.content:
Hello community, I am following this tutorial: https://github.com/SAP-samples/abap-platform-refscen-flight/blob/ABAP-platform-2019/README.md to generate ABAP Flight Reference Scenario tables, but when executing F9 in the /DMO/CL_FLIGHT_DATA_GENERATOR class to fill the tables, the error appears: Class does not implement if_oo_adt_classrun~main method!

Does anyone know why and how to solve the problem?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: NOW RELEASED: Upload and work with external files in SAP Cloud ALM for implementation
entry.content: @Cocquerel: no, external repositories are not supported and it is currently not planned mid-term.

entry.title: Re: NOW RELEASED: Upload and work with external files in SAP Cloud ALM for implementation
entry.content: @AravindaSarangi if you use the BTP DMS to store external files, then this does not add to the 8GB limit. but you need to purchase the BTP Document management service, which has its own price based on your package.

entry.title: Input type number in combination with binding type gives problems for decimals
entry.content:
If I use a sap.m.Input with type "Number" in combination with valueLiveUpdate="true", and I use a type in my binding, like Float or Decimal, I cannot enter decimal numbers.

When I set my language to French, where the dot "." for decimals is a comma ",", even without the valueLiveUpdate, I does not let me enter decimals


Does anyone know how I can fix this issue? Please check this Plunker with an example: Plunker - SAPUI5: Input type number issues with decimals

<Input type="Number" valueLiveUpdate="true" value="{path:'/value',type: 'sap.ui.model.odata.type.Decimal',constraints:{scale:'variable', minimum: '0'}, formatOptions: {groupingEnabled: false }}"/>

<Input type="Number" valueLiveUpdate="true" value="{path:'/value2',type: 'sap.ui.model.type.Float', constraints: { minimum: 0} ,formatOptions: {groupingEnabled: false }}"/>

entry.title: Re: Redesigned candidate exp config
entry.content: This is applicable to all candidate profile and application fields using the Business rules. The business rules for Candidate Application now supports On View, On Change and On Save business rules to cater to requirements and also help dynamically to hide/show fields, change the field mandatory/Optional , etc.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
@stephan_daubI have newly installed ABAP developer trial, but I'm not able to login as DEMO license is expired now and License from minisap is not working as the Hardware Key is changing on every restart.

Any workaround?

entry.title: Re: The integration of SEPA_CT and SEPA_DD into CGI_XML_CT/CGI_XML_DD
entry.content:
Dear,

on S/4 HANA the best approach is to use country-specific formats and trees. Please refer to our collective note https://me.sap.com/notes/2784858/E. From technical point of view, SEPA_CT and CGI_XML_CT are still available, however SEPA_CT is no longer supported.

Kind regards,

Ondrej

entry.title: Re: F.13 and OB74 - Rules for Automatic Clearing
entry.content: We want the same, but can't find a way to add it...

entry.title: Transport Model from Dev to Prod
entry.content:
Hi folks,

We have a connection name SAPFIN in Dev with Dev credentials in a model ZM. I am transporting this model to Production where same connection exists with Prod credentials.

My doubt is: when I am transporting only model (not connection) to prod will the Prod connection details be replaced with Dev ones or Prod credentials will remain same and my model will point to Prod connection automatically.

Thanks,

Jain

entry.title: Re: REFX Infinite Building (perpetual term): contract mas...
entry.content:
Hi @Cedric_Manhaeve ,

Good Day! 

I read from the comment history that you tried to post for perpetual building leases.

For the long-term leases contract, normally we would calculate with discounting then reflect the present value per period. also, for how long you could post is based on the local accounting rules. 

But in your calculation, it looks like you were just trying to evenly devide those into 4 *999 pieces, without considering the insterest or anything.

could you please confirm if this is really what business users request for? 

best regards, 

liling

entry.title: Re: L_IDOC_INPUT_WMMBXY>> WE19 issue
entry.content: Link is not valid

entry.title: Re: Gross price calculation in ME23n
entry.content: Have you tried to look also in the KONP table ?

entry.title: Re: Advanced Bank Account Management (J77) - Create Bank...
entry.content: Hello Amy! Yes I have checked it but the configuration activity is 100% the same as it is in the starter system so that isn't the solution unfortunately.

entry.title: Re: The SAP BW Data Product Generator for SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content:
This is the message I get...SAP Note/KBA 3590400 has not yet been released. The SAP Note/KBA you were trying to reach is currently being created and not released yet. Please check back later.
**************************************************************************************
Also,
I assume BW DPG object store is the same object store we have today on DSP.

per the SAP Datasphere Capacity Unit Estimator  https://dwc-pricing-calculator-sac-saceu10.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/index.html

Min configuration = 1532 CU. ( 2 blocks of compute)

adding 1 block of Object Storage requires a min of 8 blocks of Compute( not Object Store Compute) for total of 4075 CU or aprox 3X the min CU/$

This is before adding any Object storage blocks and/or Object Store Compute blocks.

So this is a big jump in CU's and $ to utilize object store Any guidance on the break-even point on using Object Store ?

Thanks

Chris

entry.title: Re: New Asset Creating Warning Message- Message No-AU176
entry.content: see sap note 3297821 .

entry.title: Re: Scan a Barcode for mobile Services
entry.content:
That indicates there is a problem with the metadata bundle you deployed to Mobile Services.  The blank page is with the logout button is part of the default metadata giving you the option to logout.  If you restart the client or switch to another app and then back to the mobile services client it will automatically check again for metadata in Mobile Services App Update and prompt you to accept the definitions.  Of course if you have not re-deployed with changes I would expect you to get the same error again.

I would recommend you check the client log file.  You can access it following the steps under Accessing Client Logs in the Troubleshooting section of the documentation.  Hopefully the log will give you details about what is wrong with your metadata.

entry.title: Re: Custom Flexible Workflow steps
entry.content:
Hi Tapas,

We have a requirement to trigger email notification to requisitioner at every level of approval.

At present SAP supports approval and rejection mail only at the end of workflow. Any help on this would be really appreciated .

Thankyou!!

entry.title: Re: IBP Format sheet-Approach to do Color Code formatting...
entry.content:
Hi @Parthi4,

you can't transport planning book templates but you can open the mentioned view in IBP Test system, log-off and log-on in IBP Prod again. Afterwards you can add or update the respective planning view in IBP Prod. Pretty easy.

Alternative: Apply the same changes to the formatting sheet in IBP Prod.

BR, Peter

entry.title: Re: F.13 and OB74 - Rules for Automatic Clearing
entry.content:
Read 2005540 - OB74: Fields with a length of more than 20 

  • The length of BSIS-KIDNO is 60 so greater than 24 (max length processed by  SAPF124)
  • If the error message FC 221 is defined as E Error, this field will not be displayed in F4,
  • You could convert it to W Warning (SM30 on T100S, but remember data will be truncated to 24 during process)

entry.title: Re: Create Control dynamically in loop using SAP Screen P...
entry.content:
Hello,

As you don't have any details of what you are doing exactly, I'll give you info on what I did before.

You cannot create object (i.e Button) dynamically, so you will need to create a button and then hide it.  When you need it, you unhide it.  You can move the button based on x and y coordinates to place where you want via script.  Hopefully this enough info to get you started.  If you provide more details then a more detailed answer can be provided.

Cheers,

Brian

entry.title: Re: APIGW Internal Server Error 500
entry.content: Hello, I am also experiencing the same problems starting with 01.04 for short periods of time 1-2 hours. It seems that the ANAF API is overloaded and is crashing.

entry.title: SAP learning journey
entry.content:
Dear SAP professionals,

I'm a Data Analyst and aspiring Data Scientist working in a financial team within the banking industry. 

SAP universe is pretty new to me, and I'd like to understand the basics for my next job. What learning journey would you recommend? I was considering following this 12-course curriculum:

Intro

  • Learning the Basics of SAP Fiori
  • Introducing the Banking Industry
  • Provisioning Data to SAP HANA

S/4HANA

  • Overview of Financials in SAP S/4HANA
  • Discovering SAP S/4HANA embedded analytics
  • Outlining Cost Management and Profitability Analysis in SAP S/4HANA

BW/4HANA

  • Creating Queries in SAP BW/4HANA
  • Implementing a Data Warehouse Using SAP BW/4HANA
  • Developing Regression Models with the Python Machine Learning Client for SAP HANA

SAC & BO

  • Leveraging SAP Analytics Cloud Functionality for Enterprise Planning
  • Learning the Basics of SAP BI
  • Discovering SAP BusinessObjects Web Intelligence

From what I learned so far, BW/4HANA seems to be the data architecture behind S/4HANA (Fiori being the GUI), which is the business layer, then SAC is the global analytics solution for all SAP products (replacing the traditional BO).

Please let me know if that sounds coherent, according to your know-how (maybe I don't need to learn S/4HANA, or need to learn more about SAC...). Any feedback is welcome!

Thanks a lot for your guidance

entry.title: Re: "Mastering the Application Rationalization with SAP L...
entry.content: Hi @maniesch234! Please try this access: https://demo-eu-2.leanix.net/AppRatEnablementDemoV4 user name: certification@leanix.net pass: Demo_LeanIXAcademy

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create/Post STO Purchase order Using BO/API
entry.content:
I do not see a material code in the message you posted below. You need a material code to create STO -- you can not create a STO for text items or blank items. Also if you using API 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/91af7f8d3acd47da90d33aaacfcd0d59/c89eec80ec2043d980cb7b8c89e0a00a.html-

I do not see it support item category U=7

he service supports the following purchase order item categories:

Purchase Order Item Category Internal Symbol* External Symbol**
Standard0' ' (=blank)
Subcontracting3L
Third- Party5S
Enhanced Limits (for materials or lean services)AE
Consignment2K

entry.title: Re: When running Query in Analysis for Microsoft Office u...
entry.content:
Hi @LukaszKotarba, have find resolution for this issue?

Regards,

V

entry.title: "Talent Card Like" report created in Story Report?
entry.content: Good afternoon - Could anyone provide a resource or suggestions on creating a "Talent Card Like" Story Report where the user can enter/select for up to five user ID's and the report produces ONE page per user??  Can or How is this accomplished?

entry.title: Re: SAP Identity Directory API not working from RAP & CAP
entry.content:
Hi,

I can only comment for ABAP Cloud (not CAP), but as you are consuming a OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials Destination, you have to use i_authn_mode = service_specific in your create_by_cloud_destination call (SAP Help).

As I assume that you use destinations on subaccount level, you should also omit the service_instance_name. 

In general, if there is no particular reason for you to use a BTP destination in your ABAP code, I would recommend to use local configuration based on the communication target and communication management (SAP Help).

Best Regards

Thomas

entry.title: Unable to add Data Source(Action) in BPA Form Input Field for F4 Help
entry.content:
Hello All..I'm trying to a add an Action as an Data Source but I get an error "Service is currently Unavailable". Action when tested is working properly. The requirement is to add Plant values as an F4 Help to form field. 

There is internal server error while adding the data source

Action is working fine.

Not sure if I'm missing something.. Any help is much appreciated.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK Title/Sections
entry.content:
Some screen shots would be helpful in understanding what you have done so far.

It sounds like what you want is to add a Header to each section of controls.  MDK supports both a Header and Footer for sections.  You can find them in the BAS editor under the Section Bar group in the Controls palette.  Just adding the header will give you a caption property.  Instead of using the caption you can use an Icon, Label or Button.  The header supports one item (Icon, Label or Button) on the left and one on the right.  You can see examples in our What's New blog from when we introduced this feature.

entry.title: Re: New Asset Creating Warning Message- Message No-AU176
entry.content:
1. You MUST read the long text of the message
  2. If and when correct, then deactivate the message: Asset Accounting -> Transactions -> Maintain Message Types

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK Font-Style for iOS - change Font size?
entry.content: Can you give an example control where you are trying to change the font size?

entry.title: Re: SAP Dynamic Forms 1.0 Released Features
entry.content:
Hi @WilliamChou, 

In the blog it states "Standalone usage of Forms via Fiori interface is planned for 2.0 release (Create Maintenance Request Find Maintenance Notification, Find Maintenance Order)"

Does this mean that the full functionality of forms will be in Fiori, e.g forms linked to work order operations or task list, or will users always need SAAM to use forms in this way?

Many thanks for the information,

David

entry.title: Re: Mass Fixed Asset Retirement OData Version issue
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: REFX Infinite Building (perpetual term): contract mas...
entry.content:
Hi @LiLing, I'm a bit lost with your question. What we really want to achieve: the same calculation result compared to the Excel formula with a quarterly payment =-PV(quarterly discount rate; 4 quarters * 999 years;quarterly payment;;1). In such case, the periodic liability clearing would be equal the periodic interest.

Is there a way to achieve this?

entry.title: Re: Learn How to create a Support Case - SAP for Me
entry.content: Is it possible to categories and cluster together a list of versions created in SAC by year and month?

entry.title: Re: expected status code 200 but got 500: "error creating...
entry.content: Please see 3236427 - Mass transfer ID XXX is already being used to replicate data for table XXX - SAP for Me

entry.title: Where can I start learning features and functions of SAP Sustainability Data Exchange?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Getting Started with SAP Sustainability Data Exchange learning journey.

Overview
The learners will be able to use SAP Sustainability Data Exchange to collect, manage and share the product carbon footprint data with business partners across the supply chain.

Learning objectives

  • Explain the business challenges of supply chain sustainability
  • Maintain the master data including business partners and products
  • Request, manage and share product carbon footprint data 
Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please post you question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Processing exception during a "Render" operation. .Pr...
entry.content:
Dear AnurodhSrivastava,

please create a support ticket with the component BC-SRV-FP 

 

Regards,

Sandra

entry.title: Standard Prepayment process in SAP ERP 6.0
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have completed the functional configuration for the standard prepayment process. However, I am not confident about how the SD pricing condition types AZWA, AZWB, and AZDI are functioning. Could someone please clarify how these conditions are expected to behave in the sales order, pro forma/down payment invoice, and final invoice?

For example:- I created a sales order and saved it, but noticed that the pricing condition types AZWA, AZWB, and AZDI are appearing with zero value. I then tried to create a pro forma/down payment invoice (FAZ), and again observed that these condition types are showing as zero. I received the payment using transaction code F-29 for the above pro forma/down payment invoice.

Subsequently, I proceeded to create the delivery and final invoice (F2), but once more, the pricing condition types AZWA, AZWB, and AZDI were displayed with zero value. attached the screenshot for reference.

Could someone kindly share their expertise and provide guidance on this process? Am I missing something or doing anything incorrectly?

Best regards,

Subhramanyu

entry.title: Re: RAP - create child with IDENTIFICATION_REFERENCE
entry.content:
Hi, 
i had the same problem today and the solution is under :
https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/fc4c71aa50014fd1b43721701471913d/fd45f76da7ab49bd8a6ef94a4b64f340.html
if you have any questions please let me know 🙂
best regards

entry.title: Re: DM and STC integration - creation of a datasource in...
entry.content:
Hello @a_migliore 

 

See help:


https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DISCLOSURE_MANAGEMENT/6fda503523d6413597f5cd81be59fa8a/e59d60949549424a91a515c46b1f570f.html 

Known Limitations
The data source can only be created for the server.

 

So - make sure you have a server connection, and then you can create the new source

Regards,

Marc

entry.title: Re: CAP Fiori Elements warnings on READ requests
entry.content: Hi! Did you find any information why it doesn't work?

Hi, 
i had the same problem today and the solution is under :

entry.title: Organisational Data in SAP FSM
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I hope this message finds you well.

We are currently working on an integration between SAP Field Service Management (FSM) and SAP S/4HANA Service using SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI).

On the S/4HANA side, we have a comprehensive and well-structured service organization hierarchy. Our objective is to leverage this existing organizational structure within SAP FSM—not only at the company level but also to enforce visibility restrictions across different service units. For instance, we want to ensure that dispatchers and technicians can only access service calls and data relevant to their specific unit.

Is there a recommended approach or best practice to replicate or integrate this type of organizational hierarchy in FSM to support such restrictions?

Any insights or suggestions would be highly appreciated.

Best regards,

entry.title: Sequential Multicast suppressing error details
entry.content:
When an OData calls, after a multicast step (a single multicast step, not nested), the error details are suppressed when sending to Exception Handling.

i.e. OData Error

<error>

<code>SLS_LORD/033</code>

<message>The document is locked</message>

</error>

Error available in Exception Handling:

org.apache.camel.CamelExchangeException: Multicast processing failed for number 0. Exchange[55EE78BA9D8B2F2-0000000000000004]. Caused by: [com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.odata.exception.OsciException - Bad Request : 400 : HTTP/1.1 ]

 

How do we get to the OData error in our error handling? The normal Groovy script can only return the Camel error, which is the Multicast processing error. It can't retrieve the OData error

SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: Re: Standard Prepayment process in SAP ERP 6.0
entry.content:
Did you already read

  • Blogs such as SD Condition Based Down Payments 
  • KBAs such as 3309172 - In condition based down payment scenario, even if the order is fully delivered, the condition value of condition type AZWB is 0 in invoice or 3031123 - Unable to adjust the condition value for condition type AZWR in invoice which contains down payment clearing item

entry.title: Re: User-exit to Add partner functions in Partners tab of VA01/VA02 that gets triggered at item leve
entry.content:
Hello, I am facing a similar issue. Can you please advise what is in your method get_partner in class:

Class /ebos/so_cl_o2vmapping

entry.title: Analysis for Office – Planning data not saved after system upgrade
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm facing a strange issue after a recent upgrade of our SAP system to S/4HANA 2023.

We have a planning query that is used in SAP Analysis for Office (AfO), and it has always worked fine. The report opens and refreshes correctly, and the input-ready cells are still editable as expected. However, after we enter planning values and click "Save Data", the system reverts the values back to the previous ones — nothing is saved.

Could you help me?

 

Thanks

Best Regards

entry.title: successfactors api JobApplicationAssessmentOrder update
entry.content:
Hi

I'm using the api  JobApplicationAssessmentOrder to get the assessment orders but the api hub offers only GET. Is there an api available to update the assessmentOrders using put or post method.

Do you know where i could found any information about it ?

entry.title: Re: Create PDF with CONVERT_OTF in Unicode system
entry.content: Thanks - this fixed the problem of mangled output!

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Java 8.10 on the Horizon
entry.content: I love the part where I came to this blog and read it several times and went to a bunch of other articles and links in SAP with lots of stuff to read. I thought I was just going to click on a link to a .dmg file and start working. Instead I got to read a whole bunch of stuff about stuff I don't know. It would have been disappointing if someone just put a link to a .dmg file. Then, I would have to go to work and couldn't waste my day scrolling around.

entry.title: Re: ASP.NET Report Viewer & multiple IIS Worker Processes
entry.content: R&D is wondering what SP you upgraded from? They say nothing has changed in this area...

entry.title: Why can't I configure Generative AI Hub in AI Launch pad?
entry.content:
Hi, I am following the Developer mission below for setting SAP Gen AI hub in the AI launchpad. However, I can't enable my pre-requisite service plans for AI core (Extended) and AI launchpad (Standard). I can configure AI launchpad with Free tier plan only. 

https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/protected/index.html#/mymissiondetail/155262/?tab=projectboard

I am using Pay as You go BTP account and Free tier plan for AI launchpad to configure this, but not sure this can be achieved only with Enterprise accounts. Can you please suggest on how to enable Gen AI in Launchpad?

entry.title: Where can I learn features and requirements of advanced Available-to-Promise (aATP) in SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Exploring aATP in SAP S/4HANA learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey discusses essential features and requirements of advanced Available-to-Promise (aATP) in SAP S/4HANA. It provides a detailed overview how to setup and use these functionalities. Checking Methods in Detail and Advanced ATP in SAP S/4HANA are discussed.Also the concept and use of Backorder Processing is explained. In addition, both Supply Based Confirmation (SBC) and Business Process Scheduling (BPS) are covered. With system demo recordings and extensive hands-on exercises, you will gain a thorough understanding of how aATP can support your logistics processes.

Learning objectives
By the end of this learning journey, you will be able to describe and execute business processes in SAP S/4HANA aATP.

Prerequisites

  • Exploring SAP S/4HANA Sales
Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please post you question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Query Help - Onhand Inventory Date in Warehouse
entry.content:
Hello,


The main table that you need to search is OILM - Inventory Log Message Table

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Can you use CurrentSalary and meritTarget in the same...
entry.content:
Hi @jennifer_mckellar 

 

I believe only merit (meritTarget) and lumpsum (lumpsumTarget) have target fields hence can be marked as basedOn=Target but I will double check in implementation guide and with product team and confirm here.

All the best, 

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Could not commit transaction: Error -1 detected durin...
entry.content:
Hello,

 

There are any approval procedure active in your system?

Best regards

entry.title: Join Our Webinar on the Future and Evolution of SAP IQ
entry.content:
In today's fast-paced world, staying competitive means staying ahead of the curve in data management. If you're running your database technology on-premises, you might be facing challenges in scalability, agility, and cost-efficiency. The time for change is now, and SAP IQ, with its rich history, is evolving to meet these challenges head-on.

We are excited to invite you to our enlightening webinar, "The Future and Evolution of SAP IQ," taking place on April 29th at 11 AM EDT. This event is designed to help you understand the current landscape and explore the transformative benefits of migrating your SAP IQ database to the cloud.

 

Why Should You Attend?

  1. Understand the Legacy and Impact of SAP IQ in Data Management: Dive into the rich history of SAP IQ and its profound impact on data management within the SAP ecosystem.
  2. Learn About the Latest SAP IQ Release: Stay updated with the latest release strategies and features that SAP IQ offers to empower your data management practices.
  3. Explore the Tangible Benefits of Cloud Database Modernization and Migration: Discover how migrating to SAP HANA Cloud, data lake relational engine, can provide enhanced scalability, increased agility, cost savings, and improved data security and compliance.
  4. Discover Practical Steps and Support Resources for a Successful Modernization Journey: Get insights into best practices and strategic approaches for modernizing your SAP IQ environment. Learn about the comprehensive support available to ensure a seamless transition and optimal performance in the cloud.

Who Should Attend?

This webinar is a must-attend for:

  • Data Professionals: Gain insight into innovative strategies for data management.
  • IT Managers: Learn about practical steps to modernize your database environment.
  • Business Leaders: Understand the business value and competitive advantages of leveraging cloud-based solutions.

Key Takeaways:

  • Comprehensive Insight: Understand the legacy and future of SAP IQ.
  • Latest Information: Stay informed about the latest SAP IQ release.
  • Strategic Benefits: Learn about the transformative benefits of cloud database modernization.
  • Practical Steps: Gain practical insights and access to support resources for a successful modernization journey.

Join us to unlock the full potential of SAP HANA Cloud and drive your organization into the future of data management. Don't miss this opportunity to elevate your data strategy to new heights!

Webinar Details:

  • Topic: The Future and Evolution of SAP IQ
  • Date: April 29th
  • Time: 11 AM EDT

Register Now to ask questions of the experts and take a step towards the future of data management. We look forward to seeing you there!

entry.title: Re: Looking for feedback: Identity and Access Management resources (SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Registration has ended. Let me know in case you still want to sign up

entry.title: Capturing Pricing with 4 Decimal Places in Sales Orders
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I need assistance with the following requirement related to pricing in sales orders.

In our project, we are using manual pricing conditions because the pricing data is received from an external, non-SAP system. This system maintains prices with four decimal places (e.g., 1.2345). However, standard SAP only supports two decimal places, which causes the system to round the price to 1.23 when entered manually.

Our requirement is to capture the price exactly as received from the external system, without any rounding or truncation.

Current Scenario:

  • Non-SAP system price: 1.2345

  • SAP captured price: 1.23

Required Outcome:

  • Non-SAP system price: 1.2345

  • SAP captured price: 1.2345

Is there a way to enable or configure SAP to support four decimal places in pricing conditions?

Looking forward to your suggestions.
Thank you!

entry.title: Re: ASP.NET Report Viewer & multiple IIS Worker Processes
entry.content: Hi, it was 13_0_24 but I was running 32 bit, the App Pool had "Enable 32 bit" set to True, but when I installed 13_0_37 I couldn't get 32 bit to work (despite having the runtime installed) so I changed the project & App pool to 64 bit - therefore I'm not sure if it's the change in version as such or the change in bitness. It would be great if they could give an indication into what can be checked/tested. I still think the Client prompted parameter must/should be within the viewstate/postback? I have a machine key within the web.config file (I believe it's used with multiple worker processes) but maybe that's not being picked up correctly for some reason. Any help greatly appreciated! Thanks

entry.title: Re: Support CrystalReportViewer.DoubleClickPage in ASP.NE...
entry.content:
The only Events available in the WEB viewer are these":

I've asked R&D about making these types of events available in the WEB viewer and the problem is the view of the report is EPF based, it's an image of each page. There isn't an easy way to allow the browser and the viewer to talk to each other.

What you can do though it add a subreport to the main report so if you want another report link the subreport to the new report, you can then simply drill down.

Use RAS to add subreports in code.

See this page for the Reference material:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CRYSTAL_REPORTS,_DEVELOPER_VERSION_FOR_MICROSOFT_VISUAL_STUDIO?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Is output print preview button available in Manage Sa...
entry.content: this button is not available in V2 app, we did enhancement to achieve this requirement

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK Object table Single Select mode instead of mu...
entry.content:
Can you elaborate on the scenario?  If you want only one selection you don't need to go into multiple select just trigger your action in the OnPress of the Object cell rather than trying to show a secondary checkbox and requiring an additional press on a button to execute.

If you really need the secondary press you can use either an accessory image or icon stack image to show the selected item and manage it through your metadata.

entry.title: Re: No-Code Guide: SAP S/4HANA Cloud to SAP Build Apps Data Visibility
entry.content: Good morning. Quick question, how can I make a project have more than one member? Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Support CrystalReportViewer.DoubleClickPage in ASP.NE...
entry.content: Hi Don!

entry.title: Re: WILD CARD char in file Name
entry.content:
Try below

DATA: BEGIN OF lt_tab OCCURS 0,
          line(225) TYPE c,
      END OF lt_tab,
      lv_command(225) TYPE c.
CONCATENATE 'ls -lt ' lv_path '2005*' INTO lv_command.
CALL 'SYSTEM' ID 'COMMAND' FIELD lv_command ID 'TAB' FIELD lt_tab-*sys*.
IF sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 SORT lt_tab.
ENDIF.

  Should get 2005stcjk.txt file

entry.title: Re: Can you use CurrentSalary and meritTarget in the same...
entry.content:
@jennifer_mckellar 

Confirming that only lumpsumTarget, lumpsum2Target and meritTarget are supported.

Maybe switch extra around with one of the lumpsum fields ?

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Support CrystalReportViewer.DoubleClickPage in ASP.NE...
entry.content: Hi Don!, It will be really helpful if DoublePageClick is javascript event or something that we can handle, so it can return e.ObjectInfos. Because I can send a Callback to the server by ASPxCallback (DevExpress callback) or Ajax callback and send objectinfo that I need then open another report after ajax is complete. but unfortunately DoublePageClick doens't exist in Web version. You can support this event as Callback event or something. so after callback is complete I can take e.ObjectInfo I need and open external report based on that...

entry.title: Re: ASP.NET Report Viewer & multiple IIS Worker Processes

entry.title: Re: How can I schedule my exam????!!!
entry.content: Hi @
